form.label: Airia Platform - Executive Dashboard
form.description: Comprehensive analytics with interactive drilldowns, filtering, and real-time insights

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | where prompt_name!="null" | stats count by prompt_name | sort -count
`airia_base_with_fields` | where cost_numeric > 0 | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 2) | eval total_cost_display="$".tostring(total_cost,"commas")

`airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats count as total, sum(eval(if(Success="true",1,0))) as success | eval success_rate=round((success/total)*100,2) | eval success_rate_display=success_rate."%"

`airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats count as total, sum(eval(if(is_dlp_blocked="true",1,0))) as blocked | eval dlp_rate=round((blocked/total)*100,2) | eval dlp_rate_display=dlp_rate."%"

`airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats avg(cost_numeric) as avg_cost | eval avg_cost_display="$".tostring(round(avg_cost,4))

panel.title: Cost and Volume Trend (Click to drill down)

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | timechart span=1h sum(cost_numeric) as "Cost (USD)" count as "Request Count"

`airia_base_with_fields` | search _time=$selected_time$ | table _time model_name provider prompt_name cost_numeric tokens_numeric Success is_dlp_blocked user_input | eval cost_numeric="$".cost_numeric | rename model_name as "Model", provider as "Provider", prompt_name as "Prompt", cost_numeric as "Cost", tokens_numeric as "Tokens", Success as "Success", is_dlp_blocked as "DLP Blocked", user_input as "User Input"

`airia_base_with_fields` | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats count as api_calls, sum(cost_numeric) as total_spend, avg(cost_numeric) as avg_cost, sum(tokens_numeric) as total_tokens, avg(tokens_numeric) as avg_tokens by provider | eval "Total Spend"="$".tostring(round(total_spend,2),"commas") | eval "Avg Cost/Call"="$".tostring(round(avg_cost,4)) | eval "Total Tokens"=tostring(total_tokens,"commas") | eval "Avg Tokens/Call"=round(avg_tokens,0) | rename provider as "Provider", api_calls as "API Calls" | table "Provider" "Total Spend" "API Calls" "Avg Cost/Call" "Total Tokens" "Avg Tokens/Call" | sort -total_spend

`airia_base_with_fields` | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost by provider | sort -total_cost

`airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost by model_display | sort -total_cost | head 10

panel.title: Model Performance Matrix (Click row for details)

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval prompt_match=if("$prompt_filter$"="*", 1, if(prompt_name="$prompt_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 AND prompt_match=1 | stats count as "Requests", sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost, avg(cost_numeric) as avg_cost, sum(tokens_numeric) as total_tokens, avg(tokens_numeric) as avg_tokens, sum(eval(if(Success="true",1,0))) as success_count, sum(eval(if(is_dlp_blocked="true",1,0))) as dlp_blocked by model_display, provider, model_tier | eval "Total Cost"="$".tostring(round(total_cost,2),"commas") | eval "Avg Cost"="$".tostring(round(avg_cost,4)) | eval "Total Tokens"=tostring(total_tokens,"commas") | eval "Avg Tokens"=round(avg_tokens,0) | eval "Success Rate"=round((success_count/Requests)*100,1)."%" | eval "DLP Blocked"=dlp_blocked | eval "Efficiency"=if(total_cost>0, round(total_tokens/total_cost,0), 0) | rename model_display as "Model", provider as "Provider", model_tier as "Tier" | table "Model" "Provider" "Tier" "Requests" "Total Cost" "Avg Cost" "Total Tokens" "Avg Tokens" "Success Rate" "DLP Blocked" "Efficiency" | sort -Requests
`airia_base_with_fields` | where model_display="$selected_model$" | timechart span=1h sum(cost_numeric) as Cost avg(tokens_numeric) as "Avg Tokens" count as Requests

panel.title: Top 15 Prompts by Cost (Click for details)

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 AND prompt_name!="null" AND isnotnull(prompt_name) AND prompt_name!="" | `prompt_comparison` | eval total_cost=round(total_cost,2) | eval avg_cost=round(avg_cost,4) | eval avg_tokens=round(avg_tokens,0) | eval success_rate=round(success_rate,1) | eval dlp_rate=round(dlp_rate,1) | rename prompt_name as "Prompt", usage_count as "Usage", total_cost as "Total Cost", avg_cost as "Avg Cost", avg_tokens as "Avg Tokens", success_rate as "Success %", dlp_rate as "DLP %" | sort -"Total Cost" | head 15

`airia_base_with_fields` | where isnotnull(prompt_name) AND prompt_name!="null" AND prompt_name!="" | stats count as requests, sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost, avg(cost_numeric) as avg_cost, avg(tokens_numeric) as avg_tokens by model_display, prompt_name | eval cost_per_request=round(avg_cost, 6) | eval total_cost=round(total_cost, 4) | eval cost_efficiency=if(avg_cost > 0.01, "High Cost - Consider Budget Model", if(avg_cost > 0.001, "Moderate Cost", "Efficient")) | eval recommendation=case( avg_cost > 0.1, "⚠️ High cost per request - Review if premium model is needed", avg_cost > 0.01, "💡 Consider testing with budget-tier models", 1=1, "✓ Cost efficient" ) | eval total_cost="$".tostring(total_cost) | eval cost_per_request="$".tostring(cost_per_request) | eval avg_tokens=round(avg_tokens, 0) | where requests > 1 | rename model_display as "Model", prompt_name as "Prompt", requests as "Requests", total_cost as "Total Cost", cost_per_request as "Cost/Request", avg_tokens as "Avg Tokens", cost_efficiency as "Efficiency", recommendation as "Recommendation" | table "Model" "Prompt" "Requests" "Total Cost" "Cost/Request" "Avg Tokens" "Efficiency" "Recommendation" | sort -"Requests" | head 10

panel.title: Cost Distribution by Hour of Day

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 | eval hour=tonumber(strftime(_time, "%H")) | stats sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost count as requests by hour | eval total_cost=round(total_cost,2) | sort hour

panel.title: Request Volume by Day of Week

search.query: `airia_base_with_fields` | eval provider_match=if("$provider_filter$"="*", 1, if(provider="$provider_filter$", 1, 0)) | eval model_match=if("$model_filter$"="*", 1, if(model_name="$model_filter$", 1, 0)) | where provider_match=1 AND model_match=1 | eval day_num=tonumber(strftime(_time, "%w")) | eval day_name=case(day_num=0, "Sunday", day_num=1, "Monday", day_num=2, "Tuesday", day_num=3, "Wednesday", day_num=4, "Thursday", day_num=5, "Friday", day_num=6, "Saturday") | stats count as requests sum(cost_numeric) as total_cost by day_name, day_num | eval total_cost=round(total_cost,2) | sort day_num | fields - day_num
